category_sources: Official rest.sh homepage describes it as a CLI for REST-ish APIs with OpenAPI-aware workflows.
source_facts.description says Restish is a CLI tool for interacting with REST-ish HTTP APIs.
display_name_sources: Official rest.sh homepage title and GitHub README use Restish.
docs_sources: Official rest.sh homepage includes Tour, Guides, Reference, install, shell setup, request workflows, and plugin documentation.

tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics and feature list mention REST, OpenAPI, auth, hypermedia, JSON/YAML, and CLI usage.
